calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Amend Answer To Complaint
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Big Hair, LLC's motion to amend its answer is GRANTED. Defendant moves on the ground that discovery has shown many of the affirmative defenses it initially pled are not supported by the evidence. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-02-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
